name: ERP HR / POS / eCommerce / Customization Generation Knowledge Pack
description: CRUD and skeleton generation rules for the breadth modules around the financial core: employee, attendance, payroll, leave (HR); POS sale, POS profile/closing (retail); eCommerce order ingestion; support ticket and CRM lead/opportunity; project/task; fixed-asset register; plus the customization framework a generator needs — additive custom fields, atomic numbering series, validated import/export, shared contacts/addresses, and sandboxed print templates. Every module skeleton carries an honest 'skeleton, not full module' limitation.
license: Original professional summaries of widely-established ERP, accounting and software-engineering principles, authored for LocalAIFactory as code-generation guidance. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation, ERPNext/Frappe/SAP text, or any third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Principles are framed honestly with confidence levels; no certification or jurisdiction-specific compliance is asserted.
